reviews.comment:
Muy buena atención de todos los Playeros, amplio lugar para estacionar si querés tomar ó comer algo en el Coffee Shop.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service from all the beach attendants, and plenty of parking if you want to have a drink or something to eat at the coffee shop.

reviews.comment:
La atención es muy buena pero la forma que tienen de hacer la fila de autos malísima. Especial para discusiones como me tocó a mí con una mal educada !!

(Translated by Google)
The service is very good, but the way they line up for cars is terrible. Especially when it comes to arguments like the one I had with a rude woman!

reviews.comment:
Un cadenazo cada vez que hay que cargar NAFTA. Una cola que siempreeeeeee está! A menos que vayas a las dos de la mañana siempre hay cola para cargar. Mal servicio.  Muchos surtidores para un empleado. Un desastre siempre!

(Translated by Google)
A chain every time you need to fill up with gas. The line is always there! Unless you go at two in the morning, there's always a line to fill up. Bad service. Too many pumps for one employee. Always a disaster!
